title: ジャパンCの後に・ライバルだから

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fierce battle between Sakura Chiyono O and
Maruzensky stirs the crowd into a broiling frenzy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the racers themselves are just as impassioned
by their battle. They realize how inspiring it is to
have a rival, and how badly they don't want to
lose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Maruzensky hesitantly asks Sakura
Chiyono O if she would like to run together with
her again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without a hint of hesitation, Sakura Chiyono O
enthusiastically says that of course she would,
and that she'll win next time for sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their promised race may be behind them, but
these racers' eyes will surely continue shining with
the desire to compete. After all, that's what it
means to have a rival.
